title: First derived-from-open dataset (open de-identified subset)
context: The M2 goal includes shipping the first gated derived-from-open dataset: a small subset or aggregation of data that is already open-access AND already de-identified or aggregate, used under the dataset-inspection access protocol (bounded sample, no full extract, no real rows committed). This is the most complex and highest-risk dataset task in the project (though still riskTier:medium, not high) because it involves a real source with re-identification triage. The specific source is selected from catalog-010 (APPROVED entry); must have a confirmed adoption partner (partner-016) to justify the additional complexity. Domain reviewer + Safety reviewer sign-off required.
objective: Produce the first derived-from-open teaching dataset: a bounded, aggregated/de-identified subset of an open-access, already-de-identified cancer data source, passing the full eligibility gate with domain and safety reviewer sign-off.
acceptanceCriteria: Source verified open-access + already de-identified/aggregate via the inspection access protocol (bounded sample <= 1,000 rows or <= 5 MB; no full extract; no real rows committed to the repo).
gate-002 PASS artifact committed; riskTier:medium; k>=5 where aggregated; no direct identifiers; no sub-k cells; linkage risk assessed.
Domain reviewer (oncologist/bioinformatician) + Safety reviewer sign-off on de-id adequacy.
License propagated from source; provenance (source URL, version, retrieval date, derivation steps) recorded; safety notice present; reproducible re-derivation documented.
Completeness >= 90/100; Croissant metadata valid; Zenodo DOI minted; at least 1 exercise with worked solution.
License snapshot (committed copy + SHA-256 + Wayback URL) for the source license committed via snapshot-011.
resources: PLAN.md (§Solution — Dataset-inspection access protocol; §Data, licensing & compliance — Derived mode)
open-teaching-datasets-partner-016 (confirmed partner needed before this task)
output: The first derived-from-open teaching dataset: a bounded, aggregated/de-identified CSV/TSV subset of an open-access source + derivation provenance + gate PASS artifact + domain/safety sign-off + Croissant metadata + Zenodo DOI.
